channel.title: Columbia City Night Market
channel.description: Upcoming events for Columbia City Night Market

item.title: Columbia City Night Market
item.description:
Saturday, April 18, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: Columbia City, Seattle

Monthly night market organized by Peace Peloton. 60 local vendors, food trucks, beer garden, and live performances. Prioritizes Black-owned businesses. Free, all ages.

Event details
